name: Larry Smith
bio: Larry Smith serves as the Smith County Sheriff, leading the largest sheriff's office in the East Texas region from Tyler. Sheriff Smith oversees a full-service department including patrol, criminal investigations, civil process, and the Smith County Jail.
campaignPromises: Maintain Smith County as one of the safest large counties in Texas
Expand the use of body cameras and transparency measures
Combat drug trafficking and organized crime in the Tyler metro area
Invest in mental health crisis intervention training for deputies
Modernize the county jail and improve inmate services
